reviews.comment:
Located in the city center.
Staff are nice and profesional.
They have 4 types of petrol: Nafta, Nafta premium, Diesel & Diesel premium.
Frequently has long queues as it has 2 refuel.

We paid Arg pesos 6000 foe 35 litters (168$/L)
